iot.billinggroup.CfnAbout:
Creates a new billing group.

Requires permission to access the [CreateBillingGroup](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/service-authorization/latest/reference/list_awsiot.html

iot.billinggroup.BillingGroupName.Description: The name of the billing group.

iot.billinggroup.BillingGroupProperties.Description: The properties of the billing group.

iot.billinggroup.Tags.Description: Metadata which can be used to manage the billing group.
